items.title: Cameroon opposition rallies in long-shot bid to unseat Biya | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Opposition supporters in Cameroon rallied at the end of the week in a last-minute push for votes, days before an election in which 92-year-old incumbent Paul Biya is widely expected to secure his eighth term in office.

#cameroon #election #opposition #News #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: China tariffs, Gazans return and the war on the left
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Thousands of Palestinians return to ruins of Gaza after the Israel-Hamas ceasefire. 100% tariffs and software export controls follow Beijing’s rare earth restrictions. Trump begins shutdown-driven job cuts as he targets liberal groups. Sébastien Lecornu is reappointed French prime minister and a tiny West African nation is one win away from its first-ever World Cup qualification.



Listen to On Assignment⁠⁠ here⁠⁠ (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/this-is-town-that-wegovy-helped-build-2025-10-11/) .



Sign up for the Reuters Econ World newsletter ⁠here⁠ (https://www.reuters.com/newsletters/reuters-econ-world/) .

items.title: 🎬 How 'The Last Frontier' actors trained for the thriller's stunts
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>"The Blacklist" creator Jon Bokenkamp returns with a new high-octane thriller, "The Last Frontier," which premiered October 10 on Apple TV+. Actors Jason Clarke and Alfre Woodard say they worked with a stunt team on the action-packed 10-episode series that made them "stay limber" and in shape.
 
#Apple #TV #Streaming #entertainment
